title: Revert "[InstCombine] Preserve profile after folding select instructions with conditionals"

tests.test_body:
define i32 @select_and_icmp(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @select_and_icmp(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[X:%.*]]
  %A = icmp eq i32 %x, %z
  %B = icmp eq i32 %y, %z
  %C = and i1 %A, %B
  %D = select i1 %C, i32 %z, i32 %x
  ret i32 %D
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @select_and_icmp(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
  %A = icmp eq i32 %x, %z
  %B = icmp eq i32 %y, %z
  %C = and i1 %A, %B
  %D = select i1 %C, i32 %z, i32 %x
  ret i32 %D
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @select_and_icmp_alt_bad_1(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @select_and_icmp_alt_bad_1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[Z]]
  %A = icmp eq i32 %x, %z
  %B = icmp ne i32 %y, %z
  %C = and i1 %A, %B
  %D = select i1 %C, i32 %x, i32 %z
  ret i32 %D
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @select_and_icmp_alt_bad_1(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
  %A = icmp eq i32 %x, %z
  %B = icmp ne i32 %y, %z
  %C = and i1 %A, %B
  %D = select i1 %C, i32 %x, i32 %z
  ret i32 %D
}

  %B = icmp eq i32 %y, %z
  %C = and i1 %A, %B
